For caterpillars and leaf-eating larvae, use when young larvae are first noticed on leaves. Best in early infestation and integrated pest management.
For root rot and soil-borne fungal problems, use before transplanting or at early root disease signs. Helps support soil health.
For soil-borne disease pressure and seedling health, use during seed treatment or early crop growth with expert guidance.

For powdery mildew on vegetables, grapes, and fruit crops, use when the first white powdery patches appear.
For monitoring and reducing whiteflies, aphids, and small flying insects, use during early pest scouting in the field.
For monitoring fruit borer or stem borer activity, use when you want to detect pest movement early.
For crop stress, flowering support, and transplant recovery, use when growth is weak or after weather stress.
